111	def _extract_json_object(raw: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
112	    text = raw.strip()
113	    fenced = re.fullmatch(r"```(?:json)?\s*(.*?)\s*```", text, flags=re.DOTALL)
114	    if fenced:
115	        text = fenced.group(1).strip()
116	    try:
117	        payload = json.loads(text)
118	    except json.JSONDecodeError:
119	        start = text.find("{")
120	        end = text.rfind("}")
121	        if start == -1 or end <= start:
122	            raise ValueError("LLM response did not contain a JSON object") from None
123	        payload = json.loads(text[start : end + 1])
124	    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
125	        raise ValueError("LLM response JSON was not an object")
126	    return payload

129	def _source_blocks(hits: list[Any]) -> str:
130	    from noosphere.currents.retrieval_adapter import corpus_source_key
131	
132	    blocks: list[str] = []
133	    for idx, hit in enumerate(hits, start=1):
134	        label = "FIRM CONCLUSION" if hit.source_kind == "conclusion" else "SOURCE"
135	        source_upload_ids = tuple(getattr(hit, "source_upload_ids", ()) or ())
136	        citation_token = (
137	            [f"citation_token: [C:{hit.source_id}]"]
138	            if hit.source_kind == "conclusion"
139	            else []
140	        )
141	        blocks.append(
142	            "\n".join(
143	                [
144	                    f"[{label} {idx}]",
145	                    *citation_token,
146	                    f"source_kind: {hit.source_kind}",
147	                    f"source_id: {hit.source_id}",
148	                    f"corpus_source_key: {corpus_source_key(hit)}",
149	                    f"corpus_upload_ids: {json.dumps(list(source_upload_ids))}",
150	                    f"retrieval_score: {hit.score:.6f}",
151	                    f"topic_hint: {hit.topic_hint or ''}",
152	                    f"origin: {hit.origin or ''}",
153	                    "text:",
154	                    hit.text,
155	                    f"[/{label} {idx}]",
156	                ]
157	            )
158	        )
159	    return "\n\n".join(blocks)

162	def _event_metrics(event: Any) -> dict[str, float | int]:
163	    raw = getattr(event, "metrics", None)
164	    if raw is None:
165	        return {}
166	    if hasattr(raw, "model_dump"):
167	        data = raw.model_dump(mode="json")
168	    elif isinstance(raw, dict):
169	        data = raw
170	    else:
171	        data = {
172	            field: getattr(raw, field)
173	            for field in EVENT_METRIC_FIELDS
174	            if hasattr(raw, field)
175	        }
176	
177	    metrics: dict[str, float | int] = {}
178	    for field in EVENT_METRIC_FIELDS:
179	        value = data.get(field) if isinstance(data, dict) else None
180	        if isinstance(value, bool) or value is None:
181	            continue
182	        try:
183	            number = float(value)
184	        except (TypeError, ValueError):
185	            continue
186	        if field == "significance_score":
187	            metrics[field] = round(number, 6)
188	        else:
189	            metrics[field] = int(number)
190	    return metrics
191	
192	
193	def _event_metrics_block(event: Any) -> str:
194	    metrics = _event_metrics(event)
195	    if not metrics:
196	        return "event_metrics: unavailable"
197	    return "\n".join(
198	        ["event_metrics:"]
199	        + [
200	            f"{field}: {metrics[field]}"
201	            for field in EVENT_METRIC_FIELDS
202	            if field in metrics
203	        ]
204	    )

206	
207	def _primary_event_metric(
208	    metrics: dict[str, float | int],
209	) -> tuple[str, float | int | None]:
210	    significance = metrics.get("significance_score")
211	    if isinstance(significance, int | float) and significance > 0:
212	        return "significance_score", significance
213	    count_fields = [
214	        field for field in EVENT_METRIC_FIELDS if field != "significance_score"
215	    ]
216	    present = [(field, metrics[field]) for field in count_fields if field in metrics]
217	    if not present:
218	        return "unavailable", None
219	    return max(present, key=lambda item: float(item[1]))

224	    primary_metric, primary_value = _primary_event_metric(metrics)

227	        "event_source": _event_source_value(event),
228	        "primary_event_metric": primary_metric,
229	        "primary_event_metric_value": primary_value,

283	            "FIRM PRIOR CONCLUSIONS AS COMMENTARY VOICE",

289	            ),

291	            "ANALYSIS TASK",
292	            (
293	                "Write the firm's response to this specific observed "
294	                f"{source_label.lower()}. The event is the subject; the firm's "
295	                "prior conclusions are the commentator's voice. Do not refer to "
296	                "an undefined event; name the post, its author, or its claim when "
297	                "the analysis needs a subject."

305	def _source_id_from_citation(raw: dict[str, Any], source_kind: str | None) -> str:
306	    source_id = raw.get("source_id") or raw.get("sourceId")
307	    if not source_id and source_kind == "conclusion":
308	        source_id = raw.get("conclusion_id") or raw.get("conclusionId")
309	    if not source_id and source_kind == "claim":
310	        source_id = raw.get("claim_id") or raw.get("claimId")
311	    return str(source_id or "")
312	
313	
314	def validate_citations(
315	    raw_citations: Any,
316	    hits: list[Any],
317	    *,
318	    require_any: bool,
319	) -> tuple[list[dict[str, Any]], list[str]]:
320	    """Return normalized citations plus exact-substring validation errors."""
321	    if not isinstance(raw_citations, list):
322	        return [], ["citations must be a list"]
323	
324	    by_pair = {(hit.source_kind, hit.source_id): hit for hit in hits}
325	    by_id: dict[str, list[Any]] = {}
326	    for hit in hits:
327	        by_id.setdefault(hit.source_id, []).append(hit)
328	
329	    normalized: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
330	    errors: list[str] = []
331	    for idx, raw in enumerate(raw_citations):
332	        if not isinstance(raw, dict):
333	            errors.append(f"citation {idx} is not an object")
334	            continue
335	        raw_kind = raw.get("source_kind") or raw.get("sourceKind")
336	        source_kind = str(raw_kind).lower() if raw_kind else None
337	        if source_kind not in {"conclusion", "claim"}:
338	            source_kind = None
339	        source_id = _source_id_from_citation(raw, source_kind)
340	        if source_kind is None and source_id in by_id and len(by_id[source_id]) == 1:
341	            source_kind = by_id[source_id][0].source_kind
342	        quoted_span = raw.get("quoted_span") or raw.get("quotedSpan")
343	        if not source_kind or not source_id:
344	            errors.append(f"citation {idx} is missing source_kind/source_id")
345	            continue
346	        if not isinstance(quoted_span, str) or not quoted_span:
347	            errors.append(f"citation {idx} is missing quoted_span")
348	            continue
349	        hit = by_pair.get((source_kind, source_id))
350	        if hit is None:
351	            errors.append(f"citation {idx} cites an unretrieved source")
352	            continue
353	        if quoted_span not in hit.text:
354	            errors.append(f"citation {idx} quoted_span is not a verbatim substring")
355	            continue
356	        normalized.append(
357	            {
358	                "source_kind": source_kind,
359	                "source_id": source_id,
360	                "quoted_span": quoted_span,
361	                "retrieval_score": hit.score,
362	            }
363	        )
364	
365	    if require_any and not normalized:
366	        errors.append("published opinions require at least one valid citation")
367	    return normalized, errors
368

370	def _citation_rows(
371	    citations: list[dict[str, Any]],
372	    *,
373	    event: Any,
374	) -> list[OpinionCitation]:
375	    rows: list[OpinionCitation] = []
376	    justification_metadata = _citation_justification_metadata(event)
377	    for citation in citations:
378	        source_kind = citation["source_kind"]
379	        source_id = citation["source_id"]
380	        rows.append(
381	            OpinionCitation(
382	                opinion_id="",
383	                source_kind=source_kind,
384	                conclusion_id=source_id if source_kind == "conclusion" else None,
385	                claim_id=source_id if source_kind == "claim" else None,
386	                quoted_span=citation["quoted_span"],
387	                retrieval_score=float(citation["retrieval_score"]),
388	                justification_metadata=dict(justification_metadata),
389	            )
390	        )
391	    return rows

394	def _uncertainty_notes(value: Any) -> list[str]:
395	    if not isinstance(value, list):
396	        return []
397	    return [str(item) for item in value if str(item).strip()]
398

400	def _confidence(value: Any) -> float:
401	    try:
402	        parsed = float(value)
403	    except (TypeError, ValueError):
404	        return 0.0
405	    return max(0.0, min(1.0, parsed))
406	
407	
408	def _eligible_conclusion_hits(hits: list[Any]) -> list[Any]:
409	    return [
410	        hit
411	        for hit in hits[:DEFAULT_TOP_K]
412	        if hit.source_kind == "conclusion" and hit.score >= MIN_CONCLUSION_SCORE
413	    ]
414	
415	
416	def _distinct_corpus_source_count(hits: list[Any]) -> int:
417	    from noosphere.currents.retrieval_adapter import distinct_corpus_source_count
418	
419	    return distinct_corpus_source_count(hits)
420	
421	
422	def _insufficient_context_reason(hits: list[Any]) -> str | None:
423	    if len(hits) < MIN_CONCLUSIONS_FOR_OPINION:
424	        return "fewer_than_3_relevant_conclusions"
425	    if _distinct_corpus_source_count(hits) < MIN_CORPUS_SOURCES_FOR_OPINION:
426	        return "fewer_than_3_distinct_corpus_sources"
427	    return None
428	
429	
430	def _off_domain_hits(retrieved_hits: list[Any], eligible_hits: list[Any]) -> bool:
431	    return bool(retrieved_hits) and not eligible_hits
432	
433	
434	def _write_abstention_opinion(
435	    store: Any,
436	    event: Any,
437	    *,
438	    reason: AbstentionReason,
439	) -> None:
440	    opinion = EventOpinion(
441	        organization_id=getattr(event, "organization_id"),
442	        event_id=str(getattr(event, "id")),
443	        stance=OpinionStance.ABSTAINED,
444	        confidence=0.0,
445	        headline="No firm opinion",
446	        body_markdown="",
447	        uncertainty_notes=[],
448	        topic_hint=getattr(event, "topic_hint", None),
449	        model_name="retrieval-gate",
450	        prompt_tokens=0,
451	        completion_tokens=0,
452	        abstention_reason=reason,
453	    )
454	    store.add_event_opinion(opinion, [])
455	
456	
457	def _opinion_dry_run(
458	    event: Any,
459	    hits: list[Any],
460	    *,
461	    retrieved_hits: list[Any],
462	) -> OpinionDryRun:
463	    base_system = _read_system_prompt("opinion_system.md")
464	    user_prompt = _opinion_user_prompt(event, hits)
465	    inline_ids = set(CONCLUSION_TOKEN_RE.findall(user_prompt))
466	    reason = (
467	        OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_OFF_DOMAIN.value
468	        if _off_domain_hits(retrieved_hits, hits)
469	        else _insufficient_context_reason(hits)
470	    )
471	    return OpinionDryRun(
472	        event_id=str(getattr(event, "id", "")),
473	        eligible=reason is None,
474	        reason=reason,
475	        retrieved_conclusions=len(hits),
476	        prompt_conclusion_citations=len(inline_ids),
477	        system_prompt_chars=len(base_system),
478	        user_prompt_chars=len(user_prompt),
479	    )
480	
481	
482	def _inline_conclusion_errors(
483	    body_markdown: str,
484	    citations: list[dict[str, Any]],
485	) -> list[str]:
486	    conclusion_ids = {
487	        citation["source_id"]
488	        for citation in citations
489	        if citation["source_kind"] == "conclusion"
490	    }
491	    errors: list[str] = []
492	    if len(conclusion_ids) < MIN_CONCLUSIONS_FOR_OPINION:
493	        errors.append(
494	            "published opinions require at least 3 valid Conclusion citations"
495	        )
496	
497	    inline_ids = set(CONCLUSION_TOKEN_RE.findall(body_markdown))
498	    supported_inline_ids = inline_ids.intersection(conclusion_ids)
499	    if len(supported_inline_ids) < MIN_CONCLUSIONS_FOR_OPINION:
500	        errors.append(
501	            "body_markdown must cite at least 3 firm Conclusions inline with "
502	            "[C:<id>] tokens"
503	        )
504	    return errors
505	
506	
507	def _source_subject_errors(event: Any, headline: str, body_markdown: str) -> list[str]:
508	    if _event_source_label(event) != "X POST":
509	        return []
510	    haystack = "\n".join([headline, body_markdown])
511	    if GENERIC_EVENT_SUBJECT_RE.search(haystack):
512	        return [
513	            "X-post opinions must refer to the observed source as a post, "
514	            "X post, author, or claim, not as a generic event"
515	        ]
516	    return []
517

520	    store: Any,
521	    *,
522	    opinion_payload: dict[str, Any],
523	    cited_source_ids: list[str],
524	    citations: list[OpinionCitation],
525	    uncertainty_notes: list[str],
526	    budget: Any,
527	    client: Any,
528	) -> tuple[list[OpinionCitation], list[str]]:
529	    """Run the dialectic engine and attach its result to the opinion payload.
530	
531	    The OpinionCitation table is the persistence venue: when a counter-claim
532	    qualifies, we append a row pointing at the counter source with the
533	    reconciliation paragraph in `justification_metadata`. When no candidate
534	    clears the similarity floor, we append a stable marker tag to
535	    `uncertainty_notes` rather than fabricating a strawman row. Dialectic
536	    failures (probe errors, LLM errors, missing candidates) all collapse to
537	    the no-counter path so the surrounding opinion pipeline stays
538	    fault-tolerant.
539	    """
540	
541	    try:
542	        counter = dialectic.find_counter_claim(
543	            store,
544	            opinion_payload=opinion_payload,
545	            excluded_source_ids=cited_source_ids,
546	        )
547	    except Exception:
548	        counter = None
549	
550	    if counter is None:
551	        if dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG not in uncertainty_notes:
552	            uncertainty_notes = list(uncertainty_notes) + [
553	                dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG
554	            ]
555	        return citations, uncertainty_notes
556	
557	    try:
558	        reconciliation = await dialectic.generate_reconciliation(
559	            opinion_payload=opinion_payload,
560	            counter_claim=counter,
561	            budget=budget,
562	            client=client,
563	        )
564	    except Exception:
565	        if dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG not in uncertainty_notes:
566	            uncertainty_notes = list(uncertainty_notes) + [
567	                dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG
568	            ]
569	        return citations, uncertainty_notes
570	
571	    if reconciliation.no_counter_found or reconciliation.counter_claim is None:
572	        if dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG not in uncertainty_notes:
573	            uncertainty_notes = list(uncertainty_notes) + [
574	                dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG
575	            ]
576	        return citations, uncertainty_notes
577	
578	    quoted_span = dialectic.counter_quoted_span(reconciliation.counter_claim)
579	    if not quoted_span:
580	        if dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG not in uncertainty_notes:
581	            uncertainty_notes = list(uncertainty_notes) + [
582	                dialectic.NO_COUNTER_UNCERTAINTY_TAG
583	            ]
584	        return citations, uncertainty_notes
585	
586	    counter_kind = reconciliation.counter_claim.source_kind
587	    counter_id = reconciliation.counter_claim.source_id
588	    counter_row = OpinionCitation(
589	        opinion_id="",
590	        source_kind=counter_kind,
591	        conclusion_id=counter_id if counter_kind == "conclusion" else None,
592	        claim_id=counter_id if counter_kind == "claim" else None,
593	        quoted_span=quoted_span,
594	        retrieval_score=float(reconciliation.counter_claim.similarity),
595	        justification_metadata=dialectic.reconciliation_metadata(reconciliation),
596	    )
597	    return [*citations, counter_row], uncertainty_notes
598	
599	
600	async def generate_opinion(
601	    store: Any,
602	    event_id: str,
603	    *,
604	    budget: Any,
605	    dry_run: bool = False,
606	) -> OpinionOutcome | OpinionDryRun:
607	    """
608	    Run retrieve_for_event -> Haiku strict JSON -> verbatim citation checks ->
609	    write EventOpinion + OpinionCitations, or abstain with a precise outcome.
610	    """
611	    event = store.get_current_event(event_id)
612	    if event is None:
613	        raise KeyError(f"unknown current event: {event_id}")
614	
615	    if getattr(event, "is_near_duplicate", False):
616	        _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
617	        return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_NEAR_DUPLICATE
618	
619	    retrieved_hits = retrieve_for_event(store, event, top_k=DEFAULT_TOP_K)
620	    hits = _eligible_conclusion_hits(retrieved_hits)
621	    if dry_run:
622	        return _opinion_dry_run(event, hits, retrieved_hits=retrieved_hits)
623	
624	    if _off_domain_hits(retrieved_hits, hits):
625	        _write_abstention_opinion(
626	            store,
627	            event,
628	            reason=AbstentionReason.ABSTAIN_OFF_DOMAIN,
629	        )
630	        _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
631	        return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_OFF_DOMAIN
632	
633	    insufficient_reason = _insufficient_context_reason(hits)
634	    if insufficient_reason is not None:
635	        base_system = _read_system_prompt("opinion_system.md")
636	        user_prompt = _opinion_user_prompt(event, hits)
637	        try:
638	            _authorize_budget(
639	                budget,
640	                system=base_system,
641	                user=user_prompt,
642	                max_tokens=OPINION_MAX_TOKENS,
643	            )
644	        except BudgetExhausted:
645	            _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
646	            return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_BUDGET
647	        _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
648	        return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES
649	
650	    base_system = _read_system_prompt("opinion_system.md")
651	    user_prompt = _opinion_user_prompt(event, hits)
652	    corrective = ""
653	    json_failures = 0
654	    citation_failures = 0
655	    total_prompt_tokens = 0
656	    total_completion_tokens = 0
657	    model_name = ""
658	    client = None
659	
660	    while (
661	        json_failures < MAX_JSON_FAILURES and citation_failures < MAX_CITATION_FAILURES
662	    ):
663	        system_prompt = base_system + corrective
664	        try:
665	            _authorize_budget(
666	                budget,
667	                system=system_prompt,
668	                user=user_prompt,
669	                max_tokens=OPINION_MAX_TOKENS,
670	            )
671	        except BudgetExhausted:
672	            _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
673	            return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_BUDGET
674	
675	        if client is None:
676	            client = make_client()
677	        response = await client.complete(
678	            system=system_prompt,
679	            user=user_prompt,
680	            max_tokens=OPINION_MAX_TOKENS,
681	            temperature=0.0,
682	        )
683	        _charge_budget(budget, response)
684	        total_prompt_tokens += response.prompt_tokens
685	        total_completion_tokens += response.completion_tokens
686	        model_name = response.model or model_name
687	
688	        raw_text = response.text.strip()
689	        if raw_text == "":
690	            _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
691	            return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES
692	
693	        try:
694	            payload = _extract_json_object(raw_text)
695	        except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):
696	            json_failures += 1
697	            corrective = (
698	                "\n\nCorrection: the previous response was not parseable strict JSON. "
699	                "Return only the JSON object matching the schema."
700	            )
701	            continue
702	
703	        stance_raw = str(payload.get("stance", "")).upper()
704	        if stance_raw == OpinionStance.ABSTAINED.value:
705	            _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
706	            return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES
707	        try:
708	            stance = OpinionStance(stance_raw)
709	        except ValueError:
710	            json_failures += 1
711	            corrective = (
712	                "\n\nCorrection: stance must be one of AGREES, DISAGREES, "
713	                "COMPLICATES, or ABSTAINED."
714	            )
715	            continue
716	
717	        headline = str(payload.get("headline") or "Theseus opinion")[:140]
718	        body_markdown = str(payload.get("body_markdown") or "")
719	        subject_errors = _source_subject_errors(event, headline, body_markdown)
720	        if subject_errors:
721	            json_failures += 1
722	            corrective = (
723	                "\n\nCorrection: the previous response described the observed "
724	                "source too abstractly: "
725	                + "; ".join(subject_errors)
726	                + ". Rewrite the headline and body so the X post, its author, "
727	                "or its claim is the object being analyzed."
728	            )
729	            continue
730	
731	        citations, citation_errors = validate_citations(
732	            payload.get("citations"),
733	            hits,
734	            require_any=True,
735	        )
736	        citation_errors.extend(
737	            _inline_conclusion_errors(
738	                str(payload.get("body_markdown") or ""),
739	                citations,
740	            )
741	        )
742	        if citation_errors:
743	            citation_failures += 1
744	            if citation_failures >= MAX_CITATION_FAILURES:
745	                _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
746	                return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_CITATION_FABRICATION
747	            corrective = (
748	                "\n\nCorrection: the previous response failed exact citation "
749	                "validation: "
750	                + "; ".join(citation_errors[:3])
751	                + ". Every citation quoted_span must be copied exactly from the "
752	                "cited source text."
753	            )
754	            continue
755	
756	        citation_rows = _citation_rows(citations, event=event)
757	        uncertainty_notes_list = _uncertainty_notes(payload.get("uncertainty_notes"))
758	        opinion_payload = {
759	            "stance": stance.value,
760	            "headline": headline,
761	            "body_markdown": body_markdown,
762	        }
763	        cited_source_ids = [citation["source_id"] for citation in citations]
764	        if DIALECTIC_ENABLED:
765	            citation_rows, uncertainty_notes_list = await _attach_reconciliation(
766	                store,
767	                opinion_payload=opinion_payload,
768	                cited_source_ids=cited_source_ids,
769	                citations=citation_rows,
770	                uncertainty_notes=uncertainty_notes_list,
771	                budget=budget,
772	                client=client,
773	            )
774	        opinion = EventOpinion(
775	            organization_id=getattr(event, "organization_id"),
776	            event_id=event_id,
777	            stance=stance,
778	            confidence=_confidence(payload.get("confidence")),
779	            headline=headline,
780	            body_markdown=body_markdown,
781	            uncertainty_notes=uncertainty_notes_list,
782	            topic_hint=payload.get("topic_hint") or getattr(event, "topic_hint", None),
783	            model_name=model_name or "claude-haiku-4-5",
784	            prompt_tokens=total_prompt_tokens,
785	            completion_tokens=total_completion_tokens,
786	        )
787	        try:
788	            store.add_event_opinion(opinion, citation_rows)
789	        except ValueError as exc:
790	            if "verbatim substring" not in str(exc):
791	                raise
792	            citation_failures += 1
793	            if citation_failures >= MAX_CITATION_FAILURES:
794	                _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
795	                return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_CITATION_FABRICATION
796	            corrective = (
797	                "\n\nCorrection: the previous response failed the database's "
798	                "verbatim citation check. Copy quoted_span exactly from source text."
799	            )
800	            continue
801	        _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.OPINED)
802	        return OpinionOutcome.PUBLISHED
803	
804	    _set_event_status(store, event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
805	    return OpinionOutcome.ABSTAINED_CITATION_FABRICATION

1	"""Thin async Polymarket Gamma API client for Forecasts ingestion."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	import asyncio
6	from dataclasses import dataclass
7	from datetime import UTC, datetime
8	from email.utils import parsedate_to_datetime
9	from typing import Any, Literal, Optional
10	
11	try:  # pragma: no cover - exercised only in environments with tenacity installed.
12	    import tenacity
13	except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - local test env may omit optional deps.
14	    tenacity = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
15	
16	
17	class PolymarketGammaError(RuntimeError):
18	    """Raised for non-retryable Gamma API responses."""
19	
20	    def __init__(self, status_code: int, body: str) -> None:
21	        self.status_code = status_code
22	        self.body = body
23	        super().__init__(f"Polymarket Gamma returned {status_code}: {body}")
24	
25	
26	@dataclass
27	class _RetryableHTTPStatus(Exception):
28	    status_code: int
29	    body: str
30	    retry_after_s: float | None = None
31	
32	
33	ResolutionOutcome = Literal["YES", "NO", "CANCELLED", "STILL_OPEN"]
34	
35	
36	@dataclass(frozen=True)
37	class ResolutionRecord:
38	    """Venue-side resolution snapshot used by the backfill driver.
39	
40	    The driver consumes one of these per market and decides whether to
41	    write a ForecastResolution, a ResolutionMismatch, or skip.
42	    """
43	
44	    venue: str
45	    market_id: str
46	    outcome: ResolutionOutcome
47	    resolved_at: Optional[datetime]
48	    source_url: Optional[str]
49	    raw: Optional[dict[str, Any]]
50	
51	
52	class PolymarketGammaClient:
53	    def __init__(self, *, base: str, timeout_s: float = 15.0) -> None:
54	        self._base = base.rstrip("/")
55	        self._timeout_s = timeout_s
56	        self._client: Any | None = None
57	
58	    async def aclose(self) -> None:
59	        if self._client is not None:
60	            await self._client.aclose()
61	            self._client = None
62	
63	    async def list_markets(
64	        self,
65	        *,
66	        active: bool = True,
67	        closed: bool = False,
68	        limit: int = 100,
69	        offset: int = 0,
70	    ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
71	        payload = await self._request(
72	            "GET",
73	            "/markets",
74	            params={
75	                "active": str(active).lower(),
76	                "closed": str(closed).lower(),
77	                "limit": limit,
78	                "offset": offset,
79	            },
80	        )
81	        if payload is None:
82	            return []
83	        if isinstance(payload, list):
84	            return [item for item in payload if isinstance(item, dict)]
85	        if isinstance(payload, dict):
86	            for key in ("markets", "data", "items", "results"):
87	                items = payload.get(key)
88	                if isinstance(items, list):
89	                    return [item for item in items if isinstance(item, dict)]
90	        raise PolymarketGammaError(200, "unexpected list_markets payload shape")
91	
92	    async def get_market(self, condition_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
93	        payload = await self._request("GET", f"/markets/{condition_id}", params={})
94	        if payload is None:
95	            return None
96	        if not isinstance(payload, dict):
97	            raise PolymarketGammaError(200, "unexpected get_market payload shape")
98	        return payload
99	
100	    async def fetch_resolution(
101	        self, market_id: str
102	    ) -> ResolutionRecord | None:
103	        """Return the venue's view of `market_id`'s resolution, or None if
104	        the market is unknown. ``outcome == "STILL_OPEN"`` means the
105	        market exists but has not resolved yet.
106	        """
107	
108	        from noosphere.forecasts.resolution_tracker import (
109	            _parse_polymarket_settlement,
110	        )
111	
112	        payload = await self.get_market(market_id)
113	        if payload is None:
114	            return None
115	        settlement = _parse_polymarket_settlement(payload)
116	        return ResolutionRecord(
117	            venue="POLYMARKET",
118	            market_id=market_id,
119	            outcome=settlement.outcome,
120	            resolved_at=settlement.resolved_at,
121	            source_url=_polymarket_resolution_url(payload, market_id),
122	            raw=settlement.raw,
123	        )
124	
125	    async def _request(
126	        self,
127	        method: str,
128	        path: str,
129	        *,
130	        params: dict[str, str | int],
131	    ) -> Any | None:
132	        if tenacity is not None:
133	            return await self._request_with_tenacity(method, path, params=params)
134	        return await self._request_with_manual_retry(method, path, params=params)
135	
136	    async def _request_with_tenacity(
137	        self,
138	        method: str,
139	        path: str,
140	        *,
141	        params: dict[str, str | int],
142	    ) -> Any | None:
143	        assert tenacity is not None
144	        try:
145	            async for attempt in tenacity.AsyncRetrying(
146	                retry=tenacity.retry_if_exception_type(_RetryableHTTPStatus),
147	                wait=_retry_wait_s,
148	                stop=tenacity.stop_after_attempt(5),
149	                reraise=True,
150	            ):
151	                with attempt:
152	                    return await self._send_once(method, path, params=params)
153	        except _RetryableHTTPStatus as exc:
154	            raise PolymarketGammaError(exc.status_code, exc.body) from exc
155	        raise RuntimeError("unreachable Polymarket retry state")
156	
157	    async def _request_with_manual_retry(
158	        self,
159	        method: str,
160	        path: str,
161	        *,
162	        params: dict[str, str | int],
163	    ) -> Any | None:
164	        for attempt in range(1, 6):
165	            try:
166	                return await self._send_once(method, path, params=params)
167	            except _RetryableHTTPStatus as exc:
168	                if attempt >= 5:
169	                    raise PolymarketGammaError(exc.status_code, exc.body) from exc
170	                await asyncio.sleep(_manual_retry_wait_s(exc, attempt))
171	        raise RuntimeError("unreachable Polymarket retry state")
172	
173	    async def _send_once(
174	        self,
175	        method: str,
176	        path: str,
177	        *,
178	        params: dict[str, str | int],
179	    ) -> Any | None:
180	        client = self._ensure_client()
181	        response = await client.request(method, f"{self._base}{path}", params=params)
182	        if response.status_code == 404:
183	            return None
184	        if response.status_code == 429 or 500 <= response.status_code < 600:
185	            raise _RetryableHTTPStatus(
186	                response.status_code,
187	                response.text,
188	                _retry_after_s(response.headers.get("Retry-After")),
189	            )
190	        if 400 <= response.status_code:
191	            raise PolymarketGammaError(response.status_code, response.text)
192	        return response.json()
193	
194	    def _ensure_client(self) -> Any:
195	        if self._client is None:
196	            import httpx
197	
198	            self._client = httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=self._timeout_s)
199	        return self._client
200	
201	
202	def _retry_wait_s(retry_state: Any) -> float:
203	    exc = retry_state.outcome.exception() if retry_state.outcome else None
204	    if isinstance(exc, _RetryableHTTPStatus) and exc.retry_after_s is not None:
205	        return max(0.0, exc.retry_after_s)
206	    return min(8.0, 0.5 * (2 ** max(0, retry_state.attempt_number - 1)))
207	
208	
209	def _manual_retry_wait_s(exc: _RetryableHTTPStatus, attempt: int) -> float:
210	    if exc.retry_after_s is not None:
211	        return max(0.0, exc.retry_after_s)
212	    return min(8.0, 0.5 * (2 ** max(0, attempt - 1)))
213	
214	
215	def _polymarket_resolution_url(
216	    payload: dict[str, Any], condition_id: str
217	) -> str | None:
218	    for key in ("resolutionUrl", "marketUrl", "url", "slug"):
219	        value = payload.get(key)
220	        if isinstance(value, str) and value.strip():
221	            text = value.strip()
222	            if text.startswith("http"):
223	                return text
224	            if key == "slug":
225	                return f"https://polymarket.com/event/{text}"
226	    if condition_id:
227	        return f"https://polymarket.com/market/{condition_id}"
228	    return None
229	
230	
231	def _retry_after_s(raw: str | None) -> float | None:
232	    if raw is None or not raw.strip():
233	        return None
234	    value = raw.strip()
235	    try:
236	        return max(0.0, float(value))
237	    except ValueError:
238	        pass
239	    try:
240	        retry_at = parsedate_to_datetime(value)
241	    except (TypeError, ValueError, IndexError, OverflowError):
242	        return None
243	    if retry_at.tzinfo is None:
244	        retry_at = retry_at.replace(tzinfo=UTC)
245	    return max(0.0, (retry_at - datetime.now(UTC)).total_seconds())

1	"""Paper-only staking and settlement for Forecasts."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	import os
6	from dataclasses import dataclass
7	from datetime import UTC, datetime
8	from decimal import ROUND_HALF_UP, Decimal, InvalidOperation
9	from typing import Any
10	
11	from sqlmodel import select
12	
13	from noosphere.models import (
14	    ForecastBet,
15	    ForecastBetMode,
16	    ForecastBetSide,
17	    ForecastBetStatus,
18	    ForecastExchange,
19	    ForecastMarket,
20	    ForecastOutcome,
21	    ForecastPortfolioState,
22	    ForecastPrediction,
23	)
24	
25	MONEY = Decimal("0.01")
26	PRICE = Decimal("0.000001")
27	DEFAULT_INITIAL_BALANCE = Decimal("10000.00")
28	
29	
30	@dataclass(frozen=True)
31	class PaperBetConfig:
32	    edge_threshold: float = 0.05
33	    kelly_fraction: float = 0.25
34	    max_stake_usd: float = 50.0
35	    initial_balance_usd: float = 10_000.0
36	    organization_id: str = ""
37	
38	    @classmethod
39	    def from_env(cls) -> PaperBetConfig:
40	        return cls(
41	            edge_threshold=_env_float(
42	                "FORECASTS_PAPER_EDGE_THRESHOLD",
43	                cls.edge_threshold,
44	            ),
45	            kelly_fraction=_env_float(
46	                "FORECASTS_PAPER_KELLY_FRACTION",
47	                cls.kelly_fraction,
48	            ),
49	            max_stake_usd=_env_float(
50	                "FORECASTS_PAPER_MAX_STAKE_USD",
51	                cls.max_stake_usd,
52	            ),
53	            initial_balance_usd=_env_float(
54	                "FORECASTS_PAPER_INITIAL_BALANCE_USD",
55	                cls.initial_balance_usd,
56	            ),
57	            organization_id=os.getenv("FORECASTS_INGEST_ORG_ID", "").strip(),
58	        )
59	
60	
61	async def evaluate_and_stake(
62	    store: Any,
63	    prediction_id: str,
64	    *,
65	    config: PaperBetConfig,
66	    now: datetime | None = None,
67	) -> ForecastBet | None:
68	    """
69	    Evaluate a published prediction against the mirrored market price and
70	    persist a paper fill when the edge clears the configured threshold.
71	    """
72	
73	    timestamp = _aware_utc(now or _utcnow())
74	    with store.session() as session:
75	        prediction = session.get(ForecastPrediction, prediction_id)
76	        if prediction is None:
77	            raise KeyError(f"unknown forecast prediction: {prediction_id}")
78	        market = session.get(ForecastMarket, prediction.market_id)
79	        if market is None:
80	            raise KeyError(f"unknown forecast market: {prediction.market_id}")
81	
82	        probability_yes = _decimal_or_none(prediction.probability_yes)
83	        market_yes_price = _decimal_or_none(market.current_yes_price)
84	        if probability_yes is None or market_yes_price is None:
85	            return None
86	        if not Decimal("0") <= probability_yes <= Decimal("1"):
87	            return None
88	        if not Decimal("0") < market_yes_price < Decimal("1"):
89	            return None
90	
91	        edge = probability_yes - market_yes_price
92	        if abs(edge) < _decimal_from_float(config.edge_threshold):
93	            return None
94	
95	        side = ForecastBetSide.YES if edge > 0 else ForecastBetSide.NO
96	        market_side_price = _market_price_for_side(market, side)
97	        if market_side_price is None or not (
98	            Decimal("0") < market_side_price < Decimal("1")
99	        ):
100	            return None
101	
102	        model_side_probability = (
103	            probability_yes
104	            if side == ForecastBetSide.YES
105	            else Decimal("1") - probability_yes
106	        )
107	        stake = _stake_usd(
108	            model_probability=model_side_probability,
109	            market_price=market_side_price,
110	            paper_balance=_paper_state(
111	                session,
112	                organization_id=_organization_id(prediction, market, config),
113	                config=config,
114	                now=timestamp,
115	            ).paper_balance_usd,
116	            config=config,
117	        )
118	        if stake < Decimal("1.00"):
119	            return None
120	
121	        organization_id = _organization_id(prediction, market, config)
122	        state = _paper_state(
123	            session,
124	            organization_id=organization_id,
125	            config=config,
126	            now=timestamp,
127	        )
128	        if state.paper_balance_usd < stake:
129	            stake = _money(state.paper_balance_usd)
130	        if stake < Decimal("1.00"):
131	            return None
132	
133	        bet = ForecastBet(
134	            prediction_id=prediction.id,
135	            organization_id=organization_id,
136	            mode=ForecastBetMode.PAPER,
137	            exchange=ForecastExchange(_enum_value(market.source)),
138	            side=side,
139	            stake_usd=stake,
140	            entry_price=_price(market_side_price),
141	            status=ForecastBetStatus.FILLED,
142	            created_at=timestamp,
143	        )
144	        state.paper_balance_usd = _money(state.paper_balance_usd - stake)
145	        state.updated_at = timestamp
146	        session.add(state)
147	        session.add(bet)
148	        session.commit()
149	        session.refresh(bet)
150	        return bet
151	
152	
153	async def settle_paper_bets_for_market(store: Any, market_id: str) -> int:
154	    """
155	    Settle every open paper fill for a resolved market and apply the payoff to
156	    the organization's paper balance. A second call is a no-op.
157	    """
158	
159	    timestamp = _utcnow()
160	    with store.session() as session:
161	        market = session.get(ForecastMarket, market_id)
162	        if market is None:
163	            raise KeyError(f"unknown forecast market: {market_id}")
164	        outcome = _outcome_or_none(market.resolved_outcome)
165	        if outcome is None:
166	            return 0
167	
168	        rows = list(
169	            session.exec(
170	                select(ForecastBet, ForecastPrediction)
171	                .join(
172	                    ForecastPrediction,
173	                    ForecastBet.prediction_id == ForecastPrediction.id,
174	                )
175	                .where(ForecastPrediction.market_id == market_id)
176	                .where(ForecastBet.mode == ForecastBetMode.PAPER.value)
177	                .where(ForecastBet.status == ForecastBetStatus.FILLED.value)
178	                .order_by(ForecastBet.created_at)
179	            ).all()
180	        )
181	        if not rows:
182	            return 0
183	
184	        payoffs_by_org: dict[str, Decimal] = {}
185	        for bet, prediction in rows:
186	            _ = prediction
187	            payoff, exit_price = _settlement_payoff(bet, outcome)
188	            bet.status = ForecastBetStatus.SETTLED
189	            bet.exit_price = exit_price
190	            bet.settlement_pnl_usd = _money(payoff - bet.stake_usd)
191	            bet.settled_at = timestamp
192	            session.add(bet)
193	            payoffs_by_org[bet.organization_id] = (
194	                payoffs_by_org.get(bet.organization_id, Decimal("0.00")) + payoff
195	            )
196	
197	        for organization_id, payoff in payoffs_by_org.items():
198	            state = _paper_state(
199	                session,
200	                organization_id=organization_id,
201	                config=PaperBetConfig(),
202	                now=timestamp,
203	            )
204	            state.paper_balance_usd = _money(state.paper_balance_usd + payoff)
205	            state.updated_at = timestamp
206	            session.add(state)
207	
208	        session.commit()
209	        return len(rows)
210	
211	
212	def _stake_usd(
213	    *,
214	    model_probability: Decimal,
215	    market_price: Decimal,
216	    paper_balance: Decimal,
217	    config: PaperBetConfig,
218	) -> Decimal:
219	    if config.kelly_fraction <= 0 or config.max_stake_usd <= 0:
220	        return Decimal("0.00")
221	    b = (Decimal("1") - market_price) / market_price
222	    q = Decimal("1") - model_probability
223	    raw_fraction = ((b * model_probability) - q) / b
224	    fraction = min(max(raw_fraction, Decimal("0")), Decimal("1"))
225	    stake = fraction * _decimal_from_float(config.kelly_fraction) * paper_balance
226	    stake = min(stake, _decimal_from_float(config.max_stake_usd))
227	    return _money(stake)
228	
229	
230	def _settlement_payoff(
231	    bet: ForecastBet,
232	    outcome: ForecastOutcome,
233	) -> tuple[Decimal, Decimal]:
234	    if outcome == ForecastOutcome.CANCELLED:
235	        return _money(bet.stake_usd), _price(bet.entry_price)
236	
237	    side_won = (
238	        (outcome == ForecastOutcome.YES and bet.side == ForecastBetSide.YES)
239	        or (outcome == ForecastOutcome.NO and bet.side == ForecastBetSide.NO)
240	    )
241	    if not side_won:
242	        return Decimal("0.00"), Decimal("0.000000")
243	    return _money(bet.stake_usd / bet.entry_price), Decimal("1.000000")
244	
245	
246	def _paper_state(
247	    session: Any,
248	    *,
249	    organization_id: str,
250	    config: PaperBetConfig,
251	    now: datetime,
252	) -> ForecastPortfolioState:
253	    state = session.exec(
254	        select(ForecastPortfolioState).where(
255	            ForecastPortfolioState.organization_id == organization_id
256	        )
257	    ).first()
258	    if state is not None:
259	        return state
260	
261	    initial_balance = _decimal_from_float(config.initial_balance_usd)
262	    if initial_balance <= Decimal("0"):
263	        initial_balance = DEFAULT_INITIAL_BALANCE
264	    state = ForecastPortfolioState(
265	        organization_id=organization_id,
266	        paper_balance_usd=_money(initial_balance),
267	        live_balance_usd=None,
268	        daily_loss_usd=Decimal("0.00"),
269	        daily_loss_reset_at=now,
270	        kill_switch_engaged=False,
271	        kill_switch_reason=None,
272	        updated_at=now,
273	    )
274	    session.add(state)
275	    session.flush()
276	    return state
277	
278	
279	def _market_price_for_side(
280	    market: ForecastMarket,
281	    side: ForecastBetSide,
282	) -> Decimal | None:
283	    yes_price = _decimal_or_none(market.current_yes_price)
284	    if side == ForecastBetSide.YES:
285	        return yes_price
286	    no_price = _decimal_or_none(market.current_no_price)
287	    if no_price is not None:
288	        return no_price
289	    if yes_price is None:
290	        return None
291	    return Decimal("1") - yes_price
292	
293	
294	def _organization_id(
295	    prediction: ForecastPrediction,
296	    market: ForecastMarket,
297	    config: PaperBetConfig,
298	) -> str:
299	    return (
300	        str(prediction.organization_id or "").strip()
301	        or str(market.organization_id or "").strip()
302	        or config.organization_id
303	    )
304	
305	
306	def _outcome_or_none(value: Any) -> ForecastOutcome | None:
307	    if value is None:
308	        return None
309	    try:
310	        outcome = ForecastOutcome(_enum_value(value))
311	    except ValueError:
312	        return None
313	    if outcome not in {
314	        ForecastOutcome.YES,
315	        ForecastOutcome.NO,
316	        ForecastOutcome.CANCELLED,
317	    }:
318	        return None
319	    return outcome
320	
321	
322	def _enum_value(value: Any) -> str:
323	    return str(value.value if hasattr(value, "value") else value)
324	
325	
326	def _env_float(key: str, default: float) -> float:
327	    raw = os.getenv(key)
328	    if raw is None or not raw.strip():
329	        return default
330	    return float(raw.strip())
331	
332	
333	def _decimal_from_float(value: float) -> Decimal:
334	    return Decimal(str(value))
335	
336	
337	def _decimal_or_none(value: Any) -> Decimal | None:
338	    if value is None:
339	        return None
340	    try:
341	        return Decimal(str(value))
342	    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError):
343	        return None
344	
345	
346	def _money(value: Decimal) -> Decimal:
347	    return Decimal(value).quantize(MONEY, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)
348	
349	
350	def _price(value: Decimal) -> Decimal:
351	    return Decimal(value).quantize(PRICE, rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)
352	
353	
354	def _utcnow() -> datetime:
355	    return datetime.now(UTC)
356	
357	
358	def _aware_utc(value: datetime) -> datetime:
359	    if value.tzinfo is None:
360	        return value.replace(tzinfo=UTC)
361	    return value.astimezone(UTC)
362

1	"""Cheap source relevance gate for Currents opinions."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	from typing import Any
6	from enum import Enum
7	
8	try:
9	    import numpy as np
10	except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - fallback is for broken local wheels.
11	    np = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
12	
13	from noosphere.currents import enrich
14	from noosphere.currents.config import DEFAULT_MIN_SIGNIFICANCE_SCORE
15	from noosphere.currents.retrieval_adapter import EventRetrievalHit, retrieve_for_event
16	from noosphere.models import CurrentEvent, CurrentEventStatus
17	
18	MIN_SOURCES_FOR_OPINION = 2
19	MIN_TOP_SCORE = 0.55
20	
21	
22	class RelevanceDecision(str, Enum):
23	    OPINE = "OPINE"
24	    ABSTAIN_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES = "ABSTAIN_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES"
25	    ABSTAIN_BELOW_SIGNIFICANCE_FLOOR = "ABSTAIN_BELOW_SIGNIFICANCE_FLOOR"
26	    ABSTAIN_OFF_DOMAIN = "ABSTAIN_OFF_DOMAIN"
27	    ABSTAIN_NEAR_DUPLICATE = "ABSTAIN_NEAR_DUPLICATE"
28	
29	
30	RelevanceHit = EventRetrievalHit
31	
32	
33	def embed_text(text: str) -> Any:
34	    return enrich.embed_text(text)
35	
36	
37	def quick_retrieve_for_event(
38	    store,
39	    ev: CurrentEvent,
40	    top_k: int = 10,
41	) -> list[EventRetrievalHit]:
42	    """Return adapter-scored source hits from stored Conclusions plus Claims."""
43	    return retrieve_for_event(store, ev, top_k=top_k)
44	
45	
46	def gate_significance(event: CurrentEvent, *, floor: float) -> bool:
47	    metrics = getattr(event, "metrics", None)
48	    try:
49	        score = float(getattr(metrics, "significance_score", 0.0) or 0.0)
50	    except (TypeError, ValueError):
51	        score = 0.0
52	    return score >= floor
53	
54	
55	def check_relevance(
56	    store,
57	    event_id: str,
58	    *,
59	    significance_floor: float = DEFAULT_MIN_SIGNIFICANCE_SCORE,
60	    require_significance: bool = True,
61	) -> RelevanceDecision:
62	    ev = store.get_current_event(event_id)
63	    if ev is None:
64	        raise KeyError(f"unknown current event: {event_id}")
65	    if ev.status in (CurrentEventStatus.REVOKED, CurrentEventStatus.REVOKED.value):
66	        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_NEAR_DUPLICATE
67	    if require_significance and not gate_significance(ev, floor=significance_floor):
68	        store.set_event_status(event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
69	        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_BELOW_SIGNIFICANCE_FLOOR
70	
71	    hits = quick_retrieve_for_event(store, ev, top_k=10)
72	    qualifying = [h for h in hits if h.score >= MIN_TOP_SCORE]
73	    if not qualifying:
74	        store.set_event_status(event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
75	        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_OFF_DOMAIN
76	    if len(qualifying) < MIN_SOURCES_FOR_OPINION:
77	        store.set_event_status(event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
78	        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES
79	    return RelevanceDecision.OPINE

except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - fallback is for broken local wheels.

from noosphere.currents import enrich
from noosphere.currents.config import DEFAULT_MIN_SIGNIFICANCE_SCORE
from noosphere.currents.retrieval_adapter import EventRetrievalHit, retrieve_for_event
from noosphere.models import CurrentEvent, CurrentEventStatus

MIN_SOURCES_FOR_OPINION = 2
MIN_TOP_SCORE = 0.55


class RelevanceDecision(str, Enum):
    OPINE = "OPINE"
    ABSTAIN_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES = "ABSTAIN_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES"
    ABSTAIN_BELOW_SIGNIFICANCE_FLOOR = "ABSTAIN_BELOW_SIGNIFICANCE_FLOOR"
    ABSTAIN_OFF_DOMAIN = "ABSTAIN_OFF_DOMAIN"
    ABSTAIN_NEAR_DUPLICATE = "ABSTAIN_NEAR_DUPLICATE"


RelevanceHit = EventRetrievalHit


def embed_text(text: str) -> Any:
    return enrich.embed_text(text)


def quick_retrieve_for_event(
    store,
    ev: CurrentEvent,
    top_k: int = 10,
) -> list[EventRetrievalHit]:
    """Return adapter-scored source hits from stored Conclusions plus Claims."""
    return retrieve_for_event(store, ev, top_k=top_k)


def gate_significance(event: CurrentEvent, *, floor: float) -> bool:
    metrics = getattr(event, "metrics", None)
    try:
        score = float(getattr(metrics, "significance_score", 0.0) or 0.0)
    except (TypeError, ValueError):
        score = 0.0
    return score >= floor


def check_relevance(
    store,
    event_id: str,
    *,
    significance_floor: float = DEFAULT_MIN_SIGNIFICANCE_SCORE,
    require_significance: bool = True,
) -> RelevanceDecision:
    ev = store.get_current_event(event_id)
    if ev is None:
        raise KeyError(f"unknown current event: {event_id}")
    if ev.status in (CurrentEventStatus.REVOKED, CurrentEventStatus.REVOKED.value):
        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_NEAR_DUPLICATE
    if require_significance and not gate_significance(ev, floor=significance_floor):
        store.set_event_status(event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_BELOW_SIGNIFICANCE_FLOOR

    hits = quick_retrieve_for_event(store, ev, top_k=10)
    qualifying = [h for h in hits if h.score >= MIN_TOP_SCORE]
    if not qualifying:
        store.set_event_status(event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_OFF_DOMAIN
    if len(qualifying) < MIN_SOURCES_FOR_OPINION:
        store.set_event_status(event_id, CurrentEventStatus.ABSTAINED)
        return RelevanceDecision.ABSTAIN_INSUFFICIENT_SOURCES
    return RelevanceDecision.OPINE

"""Forecast-specific hourly token budget guard."""

from __future__ import annotations

import os
from pathlib import Path
from threading import Lock

from noosphere.currents.budget import (
    BudgetExhausted,
    HourlyBudgetGuard as _BaseHourlyBudgetGuard,
    _interprocess_lock,
)

DEFAULT_PROMPT_TOKENS_HOUR = int(
    os.getenv("FORECASTS_BUDGET_HOURLY_PROMPT_TOKENS", "1500000")
)
DEFAULT_COMPLETION_TOKENS_HOUR = int(
    os.getenv("FORECASTS_BUDGET_HOURLY_COMPLETION_TOKENS", "400000")
)
PER_FORECAST_RESERVE_PROMPT = 14_000
PER_FORECAST_RESERVE_COMPLETION = 3_500
DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH = Path("/var/lib/theseus/forecasts_budget.json")


class HourlyBudgetGuard(_BaseHourlyBudgetGuard):
    """HourlyBudgetGuard with Forecasts ceilings and per-call reserve."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        max_prompt_tokens: int = DEFAULT_PROMPT_TOKENS_HOUR,
        max_completion_tokens: int = DEFAULT_COMPLETION_TOKENS_HOUR,
        window_start_iso: str = "",
        prompt_tokens: int = 0,
        completion_tokens: int = 0,
    ) -> None:
        super().__init__(
            max_prompt_tokens=max_prompt_tokens,
            max_completion_tokens=max_completion_tokens,
            window_start_iso=window_start_iso,
            prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
            completion_tokens=completion_tokens,
        )

    def authorize(self, est_prompt: int, est_completion: int) -> None:
        """Reserve capacity for another forecast request or raise BudgetExhausted."""
        self._reset_if_hour_rolled()
        prompt_after = self.prompt_tokens + max(0, int(est_prompt))
        completion_after = self.completion_tokens + max(0, int(est_completion))
        prompt_remaining = self.max_prompt_tokens - prompt_after
        completion_remaining = self.max_completion_tokens - completion_after
        if (
            prompt_remaining < PER_FORECAST_RESERVE_PROMPT
            or completion_remaining < PER_FORECAST_RESERVE_COMPLETION
        ):
            raise BudgetExhausted("hourly Forecasts LLM token budget exhausted")


class PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard:
    """Filesystem-backed Forecasts budget guard for separate processes."""

    def __init__(self, path: Path = DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH) -> None:
        self.path = Path(path)
        self._lock = Lock()
        self._guard = HourlyBudgetGuard.load(self.path)

    def _reload_locked(self) -> HourlyBudgetGuard:
        self._guard = HourlyBudgetGuard.load(self.path)
        return self._guard

    def authorize(self, est_prompt: int, est_completion: int) -> None:
        with self._lock, _interprocess_lock(self.path):
            guard = self._reload_locked()
            guard.authorize(est_prompt, est_completion)
            guard.save(self.path)

    def charge(self, prompt: int, completion: int) -> None:
        with self._lock, _interprocess_lock(self.path):
            guard = self._reload_locked()
            guard.charge(prompt, completion)
            guard.save(self.path)

    def save(self) -> None:
        with self._lock, _interprocess_lock(self.path):
            self._reload_locked().save(self.path)

    @property
    def remaining_prompt_tokens(self) -> int:
        with self._lock, _interprocess_lock(self.path):
            return self._reload_locked().remaining_prompt_tokens

    @property
    def remaining_completion_tokens(self) -> int:
        with self._lock, _interprocess_lock(self.path):
            return self._reload_locked().remaining_completion_tokens


def make_budget_guard(path: Path = DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH) -> PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard:
    return PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard(path)

"""Shared pytest fixtures.

Two responsibilities:

1. Audio fixture synthesis — ``tiny_audio_fixture`` synthesizes a short
   English .m4a on demand (via macOS ``say`` + ffmpeg) rather than
   shipping bytes in git. Keeps the repo lean and sidesteps the
   "who owns this recording?" IP question. Cached under
   ``tests/fixtures/`` so repeat runs are free.

2. Codex DB factories — ``fake_codex_db`` spins up a throwaway SQLite
   instance seeded from ``fixtures/minimal_codex_schema.sql`` so the
   ingest pipeline can run without a live Postgres. ``upload_factory``
   inserts rows; ``sqlite_url_for`` turns a connection into the URL
   that ``ingest_from_codex(codex_db_url=...)`` expects.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import shutil
import sqlite3
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
from uuid import uuid4

import pytest


_FIXTURES_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "fixtures"
_TINY_AUDIO = _FIXTURES_DIR / "tiny_audio.m4a"
_TINY_PHRASE = "Noosphere audio extractor test, one two three."
_SCHEMA_FILE = _FIXTURES_DIR / "minimal_codex_schema.sql"


@pytest.fixture(scope="session")
def tiny_audio_fixture() -> Path:
    """Return the path to a tiny .m4a clip, synthesizing on first use.

    Skips the calling test if neither ``say`` nor ``ffmpeg`` are on PATH.
    """
    if _TINY_AUDIO.exists() and _TINY_AUDIO.stat().st_size > 0:
        return _TINY_AUDIO

    say = shutil.which("say")
    ffmpeg = shutil.which("ffmpeg")
    if say is None or ffmpeg is None:
        pytest.skip(
            "tiny_audio fixture requires macOS `say` + ffmpeg to synthesize; "
            "install ffmpeg or ship a pre-recorded clip at "
            f"{_TINY_AUDIO} to enable."
        )

    _FIXTURES_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    aiff = _TINY_AUDIO.with_suffix(".aiff")
    try:
        subprocess.run(
            [say, "-o", str(aiff), "--data-format=LEI16@22050", _TINY_PHRASE],
            check=True, capture_output=True,
        )
        subprocess.run(
            [
                ffmpeg, "-hide_banner", "-loglevel", "error", "-y",
                "-i", str(aiff),
                "-ac", "1", "-ar", "16000", "-c:a", "aac", "-b:a", "48k",
                str(_TINY_AUDIO),
            ],
            check=True, capture_output=True,
        )
    finally:
        if aiff.exists():
            aiff.unlink()

    return _TINY_AUDIO


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Codex DB factories (SQLite-backed, test-only)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

"""Edge calculator for Currents <-> Forecast linkage.

Given a directional EventOpinion and a matched market, compute the gap
between the firm's stated probability and the market's mid-price. When the
gap clears the configured threshold, the founder portal surfaces it; below
threshold we still return the report but mark ``surface=False`` so the
caller can log without showing it.

Position sizing reuses the paper-betting engine's quarter-Kelly logic so the
founder workspace link can pre-fill a stake suggestion. The actual paper
budget guard (``forecasts/budget.py``) is not consumed here — sizing is just
advisory; the founder must explicitly confirm any position.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

from noosphere.forecasts.paper_bet_engine import (
    PaperBetConfig,
    _decimal_from_float,
    _money,
    _stake_usd,
)
from noosphere.models import EventOpinion, OpinionStance


if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from noosphere.currents.market_linker import MarketMatch


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class EdgeReport:
    """One opinion ↔ one matched market.

    ``surface`` is the founder-portal gate: True iff |edge| ≥ threshold.
    ``suggested_stake_usd`` is None whenever liquidity is too thin to bet.
    """

    market_id: str
    source: str
    external_id: str
    title: str
    firm_yes_probability: float
    market_yes_price: float
    edge_pts: float
    side: str  # "YES" or "NO"
    surface: bool
    low_liquidity: bool
    suggested_stake_usd: float | None
    market_url: str | None
    threshold: float


def firm_yes_probability(opinion: EventOpinion) -> float | None:
    """Project an EventOpinion onto a probability that the underlying yes/no
    claim resolves YES.

    AGREES → confidence (the firm is confident the post's claim is true).
    DISAGREES → 1 − confidence.
    COMPLICATES / ABSTAINED → None (no directional probability).
    """
    stance = opinion.stance
    if hasattr(stance, "value"):
        stance = stance.value
    confidence = float(opinion.confidence or 0.0)
    confidence = max(0.0, min(1.0, confidence))
    if str(stance) == OpinionStance.AGREES.value:
        return confidence
    if str(stance) == OpinionStance.DISAGREES.value:
        return 1.0 - confidence
    return None


def compute_edge(
    opinion: EventOpinion,
    match: "MarketMatch",
    *,
    config: PaperBetConfig | None = None,
    paper_balance_usd: float | None = None,
) -> EdgeReport | None:
    """Compute the firm-vs-market edge for one opinion/market pair.

    Returns ``None`` when the inputs are too thin to compute an edge
    (non-directional opinion, missing market price, etc.). The caller logs
    or skips depending on context.
    """
    config = config or PaperBetConfig.from_env()
    firm_p = firm_yes_probability(opinion)
    if firm_p is None:
        return None
    if match.market_yes_price is None:
        return None

    market_p = float(match.market_yes_price)
    if not 0.0 < market_p < 1.0:
        return None

    edge = firm_p - market_p
    edge_pts = round(edge * 100.0, 1)
    side = "YES" if edge >= 0 else "NO"
    threshold = float(config.edge_threshold)
    surface = abs(edge) >= threshold

    suggested_stake = _suggest_stake_usd(
        firm_p=firm_p,
        market_p=market_p,
        side=side,
        config=config,
        paper_balance_usd=paper_balance_usd,
        low_liquidity=match.low_liquidity,
    )

    return EdgeReport(
        market_id=match.market_id,
        source=match.source,
        external_id=match.external_id,
        title=match.title,
        firm_yes_probability=firm_p,
        market_yes_price=market_p,
        edge_pts=edge_pts,
        side=side,
        surface=surface,
        low_liquidity=match.low_liquidity,
        suggested_stake_usd=suggested_stake,
        market_url=match.market_url,
        threshold=threshold,
    )


def _suggest_stake_usd(
    *,
    firm_p: float,
    market_p: float,
    side: str,
    config: PaperBetConfig,
    paper_balance_usd: float | None,
    low_liquidity: bool,
) -> float | None:
    """Mirror ``paper_bet_engine._stake_usd`` for the advisory link.

    Returns None when the market is below the liquidity floor — the founder
    UI surfaces the edge but withholds size, per the prompt contract.
    """
    if low_liquidity:
        return None
    if paper_balance_usd is None:
        paper_balance_usd = float(config.initial_balance_usd)
    if paper_balance_usd <= 0:
        return None

    if side == "YES":
        side_prob = Decimal(str(firm_p))
        side_price = Decimal(str(market_p))
    else:
        side_prob = Decimal(str(1.0 - firm_p))
        side_price = Decimal(str(1.0 - market_p))

    if not (Decimal("0") < side_price < Decimal("1")):
        return None

    stake = _stake_usd(
        model_probability=side_prob,
        market_price=side_price,
        paper_balance=_money(_decimal_from_float(paper_balance_usd)),
        config=config,
    )
    if stake < Decimal("1.00"):
        return None
    return float(stake)

    }

"""Edge calculator for Currents <-> Forecast linkage.

Given a directional EventOpinion and a matched market, compute the gap
between the firm's stated probability and the market's mid-price. When the
gap clears the configured threshold, the founder portal surfaces it; below
threshold we still return the report but mark ``surface=False`` so the
caller can log without showing it.

Position sizing reuses the paper-betting engine's quarter-Kelly logic so the
founder workspace link can pre-fill a stake suggestion. The actual paper
budget guard (``forecasts/budget.py``) is not consumed here — sizing is just
advisory; the founder must explicitly confirm any position.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

from noosphere.forecasts.paper_bet_engine import (
    PaperBetConfig,
    _decimal_from_float,
    _money,
    _stake_usd,
)
from noosphere.models import EventOpinion, OpinionStance


if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from noosphere.currents.market_linker import MarketMatch


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class EdgeReport:
    """One opinion ↔ one matched market.

    ``surface`` is the founder-portal gate: True iff |edge| ≥ threshold.
    ``suggested_stake_usd`` is None whenever liquidity is too thin to bet.
    """

    market_id: str
    source: str
    external_id: str
    title: str
    firm_yes_probability: float
    market_yes_price: float
    edge_pts: float
    side: str  # "YES" or "NO"
    surface: bool
    low_liquidity: bool
    suggested_stake_usd: float | None
    market_url: str | None
    threshold: float


def firm_yes_probability(opinion: EventOpinion) -> float | None:
    """Project an EventOpinion onto a probability that the underlying yes/no
    claim resolves YES.

    AGREES → confidence (the firm is confident the post's claim is true).
    DISAGREES → 1 − confidence.
    COMPLICATES / ABSTAINED → None (no directional probability).
    """
    stance = opinion.stance
    if hasattr(stance, "value"):
        stance = stance.value
    confidence = float(opinion.confidence or 0.0)
    confidence = max(0.0, min(1.0, confidence))
    if str(stance) == OpinionStance.AGREES.value:
        return confidence
    if str(stance) == OpinionStance.DISAGREES.value:
        return 1.0 - confidence
    return None


def compute_edge(
    opinion: EventOpinion,
    match: "MarketMatch",
    *,
    config: PaperBetConfig | None = None,
    paper_balance_usd: float | None = None,
) -> EdgeReport | None:
    """Compute the firm-vs-market edge for one opinion/market pair.

    Returns ``None`` when the inputs are too thin to compute an edge
    (non-directional opinion, missing market price, etc.). The caller logs
    or skips depending on context.
    """
    config = config or PaperBetConfig.from_env()
    firm_p = firm_yes_probability(opinion)
    if firm_p is None:
        return None
    if match.market_yes_price is None:
        return None

    market_p = float(match.market_yes_price)
    if not 0.0 < market_p < 1.0:
        return None

    edge = firm_p - market_p
    edge_pts = round(edge * 100.0, 1)
    side = "YES" if edge >= 0 else "NO"
    threshold = float(config.edge_threshold)
    surface = abs(edge) >= threshold

    suggested_stake = _suggest_stake_usd(
        firm_p=firm_p,
        market_p=market_p,
        side=side,
        config=config,
        paper_balance_usd=paper_balance_usd,
        low_liquidity=match.low_liquidity,
    )

    return EdgeReport(
        market_id=match.market_id,
        source=match.source,
        external_id=match.external_id,
        title=match.title,
        firm_yes_probability=firm_p,
        market_yes_price=market_p,
        edge_pts=edge_pts,
        side=side,
        surface=surface,
        low_liquidity=match.low_liquidity,
        suggested_stake_usd=suggested_stake,
        market_url=match.market_url,
        threshold=threshold,
    )


def _suggest_stake_usd(
    *,
    firm_p: float,
    market_p: float,
    side: str,
    config: PaperBetConfig,
    paper_balance_usd: float | None,
    low_liquidity: bool,
) -> float | None:
    """Mirror ``paper_bet_engine._stake_usd`` for the advisory link.

    Returns None when the market is below the liquidity floor — the founder

    """
    if low_liquidity:

"""Tests for Currents <-> Forecast market linkage.

Covers:
- NLI matcher entails / does-not-entail / contradiction veto;
- low-liquidity flag;
- edge calculation for AGREES and DISAGREES;
- public-side restraint contract: edge data never appears in the
  ``PublicOpinion`` shape served to public consumers.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from decimal import Decimal

import pytest

from noosphere.currents.market_linker import (
    DEFAULT_LIQUIDITY_FLOOR_USD,
    NLIScore,
    link_opinion_to_markets,
)
from noosphere.forecasts.edge_calc import (
    compute_edge,
    edge_report_to_wire,
    firm_yes_probability,
)
from noosphere.forecasts.paper_bet_engine import PaperBetConfig
from noosphere.models import (
    EventOpinion,
    ForecastMarket,
    ForecastMarketStatus,
    ForecastSource,
    OpinionStance,
)


@dataclass
class FakeScorer:
    """Lookup-table scorer keyed by (premise_excerpt, hypothesis_excerpt)."""

    table: dict[tuple[str, str], NLIScore]
    default: NLIScore = NLIScore(entailment=0.05, contradiction=0.05)

    def __call__(self, premise: str, hypothesis: str) -> NLIScore:
        for (p, h), score in self.table.items():
            if p in premise and h in hypothesis:
                return score
        return self.default


def _opinion(
    *,
    stance: OpinionStance = OpinionStance.AGREES,
    confidence: float = 0.85,
    headline: str = "China will not invade Taiwan in 2026",
    body: str = "The firm assigns low probability to a 2026 invasion.",
) -> EventOpinion:
    return EventOpinion(
        organization_id="org-1",
        event_id="evt-1",
        stance=stance,
        confidence=confidence,
        headline=headline,
        body_markdown=body,
        uncertainty_notes=[],
        topic_hint="geopolitics",
        model_name="claude-haiku-test",
    )


def _market(
    *,
    title: str,
    yes_price: float = 0.6,
    volume: float = 25_000.0,
    status: ForecastMarketStatus = ForecastMarketStatus.OPEN,
    raw_payload: dict | None = None,
    source: ForecastSource = ForecastSource.POLYMARKET,
    market_id: str | None = None,
    external_id: str = "ext-1",
    resolution_criteria: str | None = "Resolves YES if China invades Taiwan in 2026.",
) -> ForecastMarket:
    return ForecastMarket(
        id=market_id or f"mkt-{external_id}",
        organization_id="org-1",
        source=source,
        external_id=external_id,
        title=title,
        resolution_criteria=resolution_criteria,
        current_yes_price=Decimal(str(yes_price)),
        current_no_price=Decimal(str(1.0 - yes_price)),
        volume=Decimal(str(volume)),
        status=status,
        raw_payload=raw_payload or {},
    )


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Matcher
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


def test_matcher_returns_only_nli_entailing_markets() -> None:
    opinion = _opinion()
    matching = _market(
        title="Will China invade Taiwan by end of 2026?",
        yes_price=0.18,

def test_public_opinion_payload_does_not_carry_edge_fields() -> None:
    """The Currents API's public model must never expose edge data.

    This test pins the public schema's field set so a future contributor can't
    accidentally append market-edge information to the public surface.
    """
    from noosphere.currents.status import (  # type: ignore
        # Imported only to confirm module loads; see PublicOpinion below.
        currents_health,  # noqa: F401
    )
    from noosphere.api.public_schemas import PublicOpinion as PublicOpinionModel  # type: ignore

    public_field_names = set(PublicOpinionModel.model_fields.keys())
    forbidden = {
        "edge_pts",
        "edge",
        "market_yes_price",
        "firm_yes_probability",
        "suggested_stake_usd",
        "market_id",
        "market_url",
    }
    assert forbidden.isdisjoint(public_field_names), (
        "Public Currents schema must not expose edge linkage fields; "
        "leaking fields: " + ", ".join(sorted(forbidden & public_field_names))
    )

def test_event_opinion_row_does_not_carry_edge_fields() -> None:
    """Edge linkage must never be persisted on the EventOpinion row.

    Edge data is firm-internal signal computed on demand for the founder
    portal. Persisting it on the row would make it trivial to leak into the
    public Currents serializer (which currently mirrors row fields one-to-one).
    """
    forbidden = {
        "edge_pts",
        "edge",
        "marketYesPrice",
        "firmYesProbability",
        "suggestedStakeUsd",
        "marketId",
        "marketUrl",
    }
    columns = {column.name for column in EventOpinion.__table__.columns}
    leaked = forbidden & columns
    assert not leaked, (
        "EventOpinion table must not carry edge linkage columns: " + ", ".join(sorted(leaked))
    )


def test_public_currents_types_do_not_declare_edge_fields() -> None:
    """The TypeScript ``PublicOpinion`` shape served to ``/currents`` must not
    declare edge-linkage fields. Pinned by parsing the canonical type file."""
    from pathlib import Path

    types_path = (
        Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
        / "theseus-codex"
        / "src"
        / "lib"
        / "currentsTypes.ts"
    )
    contents = types_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    public_block_start = contents.index("export interface PublicOpinion ")
    public_block_end = contents.index("}", public_block_start)
    public_block = contents[public_block_start:public_block_end]
    for forbidden in ("edge_pts", "market_yes_price", "firm_yes_probability", "suggested_stake_usd"):
        assert forbidden not in public_block, (
            f"Public Currents type must not declare {forbidden!r}; "
            "edge linkage is founder-internal."
        )
